allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
docs: 添加 README.md 文件

- 添加初始 README 文件介绍技能集合仓库
- 优化表格格式和换行

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git update-ref -d refs/heads/main 2>/dev/null; git branch -D main 2>/dev/null || true)
Bash(git filter-repo --prune-empty always 2>/dev/null || git filter-branch --prune-empty always HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "filter tools not available")
Bash(git reflog expire --expire=now --all && git gc --prune=now --aggressive && git log --oneline --all --graph -10)
